question_text: Which of the following best describes what gravity is?

options.label: B
options.text: force that pulls objects towards Earth

options.label: C
options.text: force that only affects heavy objects

options.label: D
options.text: force that prevents objects from moving

explanation: Gravity is a pulling force that acts on all objects, pulling them towards Earth. This is why when you drop something, it falls downwards rather than floating away.
